name: remote_mcp_server_per_hosting_provider
friction: Need real MCP servers deployed across multiple hosting providers to measure actual latency
output: 8 live MCP servers, one per hosting provider

name: remote_mcp_hosting_provider_tools_list_latency_measurement
friction: Need automated tools/list latency measurements from multiple geographic locations
output: tools_list_TIMESTAMP.json files — local results/ + GitHub Actions artifacts (90d retention)
schedule: every 2h UTC even hours (GitHub Actions) + every 2h MacBook launchd

name: remote_mcp_hosting_provider_tools_call_latency_measurement
friction: Need automated tools/call latency measurements to complement tools/list data
output: tools_call_TIMESTAMP.json files — local results/ + GitHub Actions artifacts (90d retention)

name: remote_mcp_hosting_provider_latency_collector
friction: Pinger results are scattered (local MacBook + GitHub Actions artifacts) — analyzer needs a single consolidated source
input: pipeline_components.json (this registry) — reads result locations from each pinger entry
output: individual result files pushed append-only to the `data` branch — one file per run, never modified

name: remote_mcp_hosting_provider_pipeline_auditor
friction: Pipeline components can fail silently — no transverse automated health check exists
input: pipeline_components.json (this registry) — reads latest verify_report from each component with a data_url

name: remote_mcp_hosting_provider_tools_list_latency_analysis
friction: Raw JSON measurement files need aggregation to produce comparable latency rankings across providers
output: JSON ranking: providers ordered by p50/p95/p99 latency, success rate, observed server geo
